reviews.review_description:
Stay forever in the loading page
edit: I made a big area, stand in the middle: was still not working but restart the quest and it was ok. 
you need to explain more the problems that may occur with area
Also I was a little disapointed
- that I didn't find how to go out to a shop or something explaining the next step or anything : tried all butons, especially the option button and nothing... (just checked the video and see there is something on your left hand, but again, it needs more explanation: why let people search and why not use the option button that everyone use in this case?) 
- to found there is no gameplay (just taking the package again and again).
Could have been a funny sorting game where you have to find witch gift go where for chritsmas (or suppress horible/dangerous toys) so you help SantaC that comes to take your bag after sorting and go deliver them (and if your sort was good: max delivery point and christmas is a success, else you have a christmas problem on all tv/radio)
Well I was expecting some game with this, and Im sure you can make something with a gameplay starting with your app

developer_response.body: Hey. It's most likely that you either haven't setup your room in the Meta scene setup, or that you haven't put large enough walls. As the conveyors need at least 1 2 street wide wall to appear! You can virtually extend your walls in the Meta settings menu. I'll add information soon in the game for when this happens.

reviews.review_title: A fun way to spread holiday cheer!
reviews.review_description: this is a hilarious way to spread holiday cheer. I played it to go through the contest but my son is playing it to practice spelling words. it gets hectic when you get into the 1-2k in the bag.
A fun little Xmas game that can get quite chaotic after a while, in a good way. The mixed reality aspect works well and it's Free! So why not?
it's fun and you'll get a present on top. that's so nice!

This game is a great way to show off Mixed Reality! Just in time for the holiday season, Santa's Conveyor Chaos has you working as Santa's elf helping him to pack his Christmas sack with presents for all the children of the world! The game is best experienced in a wide open space that is properly setup. The game starts off very easy with only one conveyor belt and the more packages you pack the more assembly lines are added. After a while the room is filled with belts dropping toys all over your play space! The game is actually a pretty good work out for Cardio as it definitely has you moving around in a frantic manor as they presents just keep coming! All while this is happening the presents sometimes have letters on them which you can lay out to spell special holiday words that earn you rewards and decorations for your play space! The game is really fun and I can see this being a perfect game to show off Mixed Reality to your friends and family on everyone's newly acquired headsets!

I wasn’t sure what to think when I first started up this game. It’s a mixed reality game and after I set up my room space, the game spawned a conveyor belt and a bag. Gifts come out the conveyor belt and you simply put them into the bag. Easy peasy… But then a 2nd conveyor belt spawned on a different wall. No problem, just walk over, pick up the gift, put it in the bag… Repeat for each gift coming down the conveyors… And then things started getting a little hectic when a 3rd conveyor spawned in. I was walking all around my room picking up gifts and putting them in the bag. And actually, I was starting to get a small workout from the walking, bending over to pick things up, etc… And then… the 4th conveyor spawned in and I was frantically moving all about the play area picking up gifts. I’m not gonna lie, this ended up being a nice little workout! Try it, you’ll like it!
There was an issue with the game where if your playspace was too small the conveyors wouldn't load in, but otherwise amazing!
